india_trends.title: Canara Bank sees NIM floor at 2.5%, confident of absorbing ECL hit without fresh equity
india_trends.summary: Canara Bank anticipates a strong FY27. Margins are stable, and asset quality remains robust. The bank can manage upcoming provisioning needs without raising fresh capital. Deposit growth is expected to continue at a healthy pace. Operating profits are projected to grow substantially. Return on asset

india_trends.title: Dr Reddy's Laboratories Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 86% YoY to Rs 221 crore, revenue dips 12%; Rs 8 per share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories Q4 Results: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories reported a consolidated net profit at Rs 221 crore in the March-ended quarter versus Rs 1,587 crore in the year ago period, an 86% YoY fall.

india_trends.title: Tata Power Q4 Results 2026: Consolidated net profit rises 8% to ₹1415 crore, revenue falls 13%; dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Tata Power Company reported an 8.3% rise in net profit to ₹1,415.52 crore for Q4 2026, despite a 13% decline in revenue to ₹14,900.20 crore. A final dividend of ₹2.50 per share is proposed, pending approval at the AGM on July 7, 2026.

india_trends.title: Adani Ports bets Rs 13,000 crore by FY31 for Europe subsea expansion

india_trends.title: Dr Reddy's Q4 results 2026: Profit plunges 86% YoY to ₹220 crore; board recommends a final dividend of ₹8
india_trends.summary: Dr Reddy's Q4 results 2026: Dr Reddy's Laboratories reported a sharp 86.2% YoY fall in its consolidated net profit to ₹220.1 crore for Q4FY26. The company's board recommended a final dividend of ₹8 per share of face value of ₹1 each for FY26.

Berger Paints Q4 Results: Net profit rises 28% YoY to ₹335 crore; declares ₹4 dividend
india_trends.summary: Berger Paints India reported a net profit of ₹335.3 crore for Q4 FY26, a 27.5% YoY increase. Revenue reached ₹2,868 crore, up 6.1% YoY. EBITDA was ₹481.7 crore, reflecting a 12.6% growth YoY.

india_trends.title: ‘Telling people to not buy gold has the opposite effect’: Deepak Shenoy shares other ways to reduce import bill
india_trends.summary: Deepak Shenoy argued that India’s rising gold imports are becoming a significant pressure point for the rupee and the country’s current account deficit (CAD), and suggested that the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) could play a direct role in easing the burden.

india_trends.summary: Aptus Value Housing Finance reported strong Q4FY26 results, with a 26% YoY rise in net profit. Analysts remain positive due to robust return ratios and growth strategies, despite recent stock volatility.&nbsp;
